name: ICICI Bank HPCL Super Saver Credit Card
exclusions: fuel surcharge waiver and reward caps apply as per ICICI Bank terms
additionalBenefits: Up to 5% savings on HPCL fuel purchases: 4% cashback plus 1% fuel surcharge waiver
4% cashback on fuel is capped at Rs 200 per month
5% benefit as reward points on utility and departmental store spends, capped at Rs 100 worth reward points per month
Additional 1.5% benefit as PAYBACK reward points on HP Pay fuel purchases at HPCL outlets
25% off up to Rs 100 on BookMyShow and INOX twice a month
Domestic lounge access subject to Rs 75,000 quarterly spend criteria

salaried: Eligibility is subject to ICICI Bank approval criteria
selfEmployed: Eligibility is subject to ICICI Bank approval criteria
